memoryArtifacts.headline: Bamburgh Castle, Northumberland, England
memoryArtifacts.description: Ralph de Percy Governor of bamburgh Castle

memoryArtifacts.headline: Bamburgh Castle, Northumberland, England
memoryArtifacts.description: Bamburgh then became the property of the reigning English monarch. Henry II probably built the keep. As an important English outpost, the castle was the target of occasional raids from Scotland.

popularStory.headline: Pierce family, descending from the pioneer Richard
popularStory.description: The genealogist of the Pearse, Pearce, Peirce or Pierce family, descending from the pioneer Richard in this country, claims that twenty generations of ancestry have been traced in England. …

zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy於1425年8月11日出生在英國越可爾萊康費爾德。他於大約1454年與Lady Eleanor Acton在英國越可爾萊康費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年4月25日在英國諾圖波藍德其勒享年72歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy于1425年8月11日出生在英国越可爾萊康費爾德。他于大约1454年与Lady Eleanor Acton在英国越可爾萊康費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年4月25日在英国諾圖波藍德其勒享年72岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy was born on 11 August 1425, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. He married Lady Eleanor Acton about 1454, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 April 1498, in Hedgeley, Northumberland, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy est né le 11 août 1425, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Acton environ 1454, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1498, à Hedgeley, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy wurde am 11. August 1425 in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1454 in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England Lady Eleanor Acton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. April 1498 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Hedgeley, Northumberland, England und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy è nato il il 11 agosto 1425 nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Acton circa 1454, nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 aprile 1498, nel Hedgeley, Northumberland, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Leconfield, Yorkshire East Riding, Engla: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Percyは1425年8月11日にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドで生まれた。約1454年にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドでLady Eleanor Actonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年4月25日にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘジェリーで72歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy(은)는 1425년 8월 11일 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1454년 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 Lady Eleanor Acton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 4월 25일 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤즐리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.11 August 1425–25 April 1498: 11 de agosto de 1425–25 de abril de 1498
pt.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1425, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Acton aproximadamente 1454, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1498, em Hedgeley, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy родился 11 августа 1425 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Acton около 1454 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 апреля 1498 г. в местности хеджели, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.11 August 1425–25 April 1498: 11 de agosto de 1425–25 de abril de 1498
es.lifeSummary: Ralph Percy nació el 11 de agosto de 1425, en Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Lady Eleanor Acton aproximadamente 1454, en Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de abril de 1498, en Hedgeley, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
